description.vi: Workspace điều hành đơn hàng có KPI, bộ lọc, bảng chính, form phát hành, cây truy xuất, lifecycle và timeline.
description.en: Order-control workspace with KPIs, filters, primary register, release forms, traceability tree, lifecycle, and timeline.

responsivePolicy.reflowRequirement: No horizontal scroll except intentional data-grid overflow with keyboard-accessible sticky controls.

description.vi: Workspace mua hàng có chuẩn nhập liệu supplier PO, danh sách PO, PO line, receiving/IQC, lifecycle và traceability.
description.en: Purchasing workspace for supplier PO governance, PO register, PO lines, receiving/IQC, lifecycle, and traceability.

responsivePolicy.reflowRequirement: No horizontal scroll except intentional data-grid overflow with keyboard-accessible sticky controls.

stateContract.loading: Show disabled transition buttons and busy status.
stateContract.empty: Show no selectable record message.
stateContract.error: Show transition error with retry affordance.
stateContract.readonly: Show current state and hide mutation actions.
stateContract.disabled: Disable transitions and preserve state labels.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Show permission-safe message without exposing hidden transitions.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Use block title or workflow entity name.

keyboard.tab: Move through available transitions in DOM order.
keyboard.escape: Close confirmation and restore focus to originating action.

focus.entry: Focus first enabled transition after record selection only when user requested the flow.
focus.restore: Return focus to triggering transition after confirmation closes.
focus.visibleIndicator: Use --brand-2 outline with at least 3:1 non-text contrast.

announcements.success: Announce completed state change through polite live region.
announcements.failure: Announce failed transition through assertive live region.

errorAssociation.pattern: aria-errormessage on confirmation inputs when reason/comment validation fails.

targetSize.minimum: 1.5rem by 1.5rem in compact density; larger where space allows.

responsiveContract.compact: Stack state chips above actions.
responsiveContract.desktop: Show horizontal flow when width permits.
responsiveContract.overflow: Never hide a required transition without an overflow menu.

printExportContract.print: Print current state, transition history summary and approval evidence.

stateContract.loading: Disable mutating buttons and preserve navigation buttons if safe.
stateContract.empty: Show only create/navigation actions.
stateContract.error: Keep safe actions available and expose retry where configured.
stateContract.disabled: Disable all actions with visible reason.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Remove disallowed actions from tab order.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Toolbar label from block title or module title.

keyboard.arrowKeys: Move between toolbar buttons when roving tabindex is enabled.

focus.entry: First enabled visible button.
focus.restore: Return to invoking button after dialogs or navigation failure.
focus.visibleIndicator: Tokenized focus ring visible in light, dark and forced-colors.

announcements.actionStarted: Announce async action start only for long-running operations.
announcements.actionCompleted: Announce success/failure through shared live region.

errorAssociation.pattern: If a command opens a form, form contract owns field errors.

manualTestScript: Verify hidden permission action is not focusable

responsiveContract.compact: Collapse low-priority commands into accessible overflow menu.
responsiveContract.desktop: Show primary and secondary actions inline.
responsiveContract.overflow: Overflow menu must be keyboard reachable.

printExportContract.print: Toolbar is omitted from print unless configured as evidence actions.

stateContract.loading: Show skeleton rows with aria-busy.
stateContract.empty: Show select-record or no-record message.
stateContract.disabled: Keep values readable and disable embedded actions.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Show redacted state without leaking field values.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Detail title or selected record label.

keyboard.tab: Move through interactive detail fields and links.
keyboard.shortcuts: No custom shortcut without visible help.

focus.entry: Do not steal focus after passive record selection.
focus.restore: Return focus to selected table row when detail closes.
focus.visibleIndicator: Visible on links and copy buttons.

announcements.loaded: Announce selected record title when detail changes after user action.

errorAssociation.pattern: Inline editable fields delegate to form-standard contract.

manualTestScript: Verify no focus loss on refresh

responsiveContract.compact: Single-column label/value stack.
responsiveContract.desktop: Grid layout allowed with logical reading order.
responsiveContract.overflow: Long values wrap unless explicitly marked as code.

printExportContract.print: Print all visible fields with labels.

stateContract.loading: Show skeleton rows, keep header visible and set aria-busy.
stateContract.empty: Show empty state with optional create action.
stateContract.disabled: Disable selection and row actions.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Hide table data and show permission-safe message.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Use table title or module entity name.

keyboard.tab: Enter table controls and leave grid.
keyboard.arrowKeys: Move between cells when grid navigation is enabled.
keyboard.enter: Select row or activate focused row action.
keyboard.homeEnd: Move to first or last cell in row.

focus.entry: First row or first table control.
focus.restore: Return to selected row after detail panel closes.
focus.visibleIndicator: Cell and row focus indicator must meet 3:1 non-text contrast.

errorAssociation.pattern: Editable grid cells must use aria-invalid and aria-errormessage.

targetSize.minimum: 1.5rem by 1.5rem for row actions and selection controls

manualTestScript: Verify result-count live region after filter

responsiveContract.compact: Preserve key columns, expose remaining fields through row detail.
responsiveContract.desktop: Allow pinned columns and horizontal scroll with visible affordance.
responsiveContract.overflow: Horizontal scroll region must be keyboard reachable and labelled.

printExportContract.print: Print current filters, visible columns and record count.

stateContract.loading: Show timeline skeleton and aria-busy.
stateContract.empty: Show no activity message.
stateContract.disabled: Render entries but disable interactive drill-down.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Hide restricted activity details.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Timeline title.

focus.entry: Do not steal focus on passive refresh.
focus.restore: Return to event item after detail closes.
focus.visibleIndicator: Event focus ring uses tokenized outline.

announcements.newEvents: Announce newly loaded events only when user requested refresh.

errorAssociation.pattern: No field-level errors in read-only timeline.

responsiveContract.compact: Single-column chronological list.
responsiveContract.desktop: Vertical timeline with labels; chronological order remains DOM order.
responsiveContract.overflow: Long notes wrap.

printExportContract.print: Print visible timeline events in chronological order.

stateContract.loading: Show tree skeleton and aria-busy.
stateContract.empty: Show no hierarchy message.
stateContract.disabled: Disable selection but keep hierarchy readable.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Hide restricted nodes and show redaction reason.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Tree title or hierarchy name.

keyboard.arrowRight: Expand node or move to first child.
keyboard.arrowLeft: Collapse node or move to parent.

focus.entry: Selected node or first root node.
focus.restore: Return to selected node after detail closes.
focus.visibleIndicator: Node focus indicator visible in all themes.

errorAssociation.pattern: No inline field errors.

responsiveContract.compact: Horizontal indent remains readable; provide detail drill-in for deep trees.
responsiveContract.desktop: Tree may sit beside detail panel.
responsiveContract.overflow: Do not truncate node labels without accessible full label.

printExportContract.print: Print expanded hierarchy path for selected record.

stateContract.loading: Disable async option fields only.
stateContract.empty: Render configured filters; empty applies to downstream result.
stateContract.disabled: Disable all filter controls.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Hide filters for fields user cannot query.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Filter controls for current module.

keyboard.tab: Move through controls in visual order.

focus.entry: First filter only when user jumps to filter landmark.
focus.restore: Return to field after async option load.
focus.visibleIndicator: Field focus ring uses tokenized outline.

announcements.resultCount: Debounce result-count live region by 500ms after filter changes.

errorAssociation.pattern: Field errors use aria-invalid and aria-errormessage.

targetSize.minimum: 1.5rem by 1.5rem for controls and clear buttons

responsiveContract.compact: Collapse into filter drawer with labelled trigger.
responsiveContract.desktop: Inline controls with wrapping.
responsiveContract.overflow: No hidden active filter; active filters show as removable chips.

printExportContract.print: Print active filters above result set.

stateContract.loading: Disable submit and show busy state.
stateContract.empty: Render blank form with required field guidance.
stateContract.error: Show form summary and field-level errors.
stateContract.readonly: Render read-only values and hide submit.
stateContract.disabled: Disable controls while preserving values.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Hide form fields or render no-permission state.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Form title.

keyboard.tab: Move through fields in logical order.
keyboard.enter: Submit only where form policy allows.
keyboard.escape: Close dropdowns or cancel dialog without losing data.

focus.entry: First invalid field after validation, otherwise first editable field.
focus.restore: Return focus to submit after save success unless navigation is configured.
focus.visibleIndicator: Every interactive control has visible focus.

announcements.validation: Announce error summary in assertive region.
announcements.success: Announce save success in polite region.

errorAssociation.pattern: Every invalid field uses aria-invalid and aria-errormessage pointing to role=alert error text.

targetSize.minimum: 1.5rem by 1.5rem for controls in compact density

responsiveContract.compact: Single-column fields and sticky submit area only when it does not obscure content.
responsiveContract.desktop: Two-column layout allowed with DOM order matching reading order.
responsiveContract.overflow: Error text wraps and never clips.

printExportContract.print: Print submitted values and audit metadata when configured.

stateContract.loading: Render static content unless text binding depends on loading context.
stateContract.empty: Banner may be hidden when text resolves empty.
stateContract.disabled: Dismiss/action controls disabled.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Do not render restricted contextual data.

a11yContract.accessibleName: Banner type and first text sentence.

focus.entry: Banner never steals focus.
focus.restore: After dismiss, move focus to next logical control.
focus.visibleIndicator: Dismiss/action focus visible.

announcements.dynamic: Use role=status for non-critical updates and role=alert only for urgent errors.

errorAssociation.pattern: Banner may summarize form errors but fields own aria-errormessage.

responsiveContract.compact: Wrap text and keep actions below content.
responsiveContract.desktop: Inline icon, text and actions allowed.
responsiveContract.overflow: Never truncate warning or error text.

printExportContract.print: Print non-dismissed warning/error banners.

stateContract.loading: Show KPI skeleton cards and aria-busy.
stateContract.empty: Show no KPI data message or zero state where business-approved.
stateContract.disabled: Disable drill-down actions.
stateContract.permissionDenied: Hide sensitive KPIs or show redacted card.

a11yContract.accessibleName: KPI group title.

focus.entry: First drillable KPI only on user navigation.
focus.restore: Return to KPI card after drilldown closes.
focus.visibleIndicator: KPI card focus outline visible.

announcements.refresh: Announce changed KPI values only after user-triggered refresh.

errorAssociation.pattern: No field-level errors.

responsiveContract.compact: Two-column or single-column cards with stable height.
responsiveContract.desktop: Responsive row with equal card widths.
responsiveContract.overflow: Long labels wrap and values stay visible.

printExportContract.print: Print KPI label, value, unit, period and threshold state.

persistence.authorityPolicy: Registry/design artifacts are backend authority; browser localStorage is cache only.
